hint.main: Type a sentence and press Enter. Shift+Enter saves it as a phrase.
placeholder.input: Type what you want to say…
status.nativeTtsFailed: Could not start the native TTS engine.
status.piperMissing: Piper is not installed or the binary path is wrong.
status.deleteOnlyList: Phrase deletion works only when the phrase list is focused.
status.restartForLanguage: Please restart the app to fully apply the language change.
help.shortcuts:
Typing
Enter — speak text in the input field
Shift+Enter — save text as a phrase
Tab — switch between typing and the phrase list

Phrase list
Enter — speak selected phrase
Up/Down — select phrase
Numbers 1–9 — quickly select and speak a visible phrase

Folders and phrases
Right click — more actions
Drag phrase onto folder — move into folder
status.piperInstalled: Piper runtime installed. You can now download and select a Piper voice.
status.pythonMissing:
Python 3 was not found.

Install Python 3 from python.org and enable 'Add python.exe to PATH', or install/use MSYS2 UCRT64 Python.

Then try installing Piper again.
status.dropPhraseHint: Drag a phrase onto a folder to move it.
status.typingMode: Typing mode — Enter speaks the text.
status.phraseMode: Phrase mode — arrows select a phrase, Enter speaks it, Tab returns to typing.
status.folderDeleted: Folder deleted. Phrases were moved to General.
status.loadedPhrase: Phrase loaded into the input field.
dialog.deleteFolderQuestion: Delete this folder? Phrases inside will be moved to General.
about.text:
Dosty Speak

Version: %1
Author: %2
License: %3

A cross-platform phrase based text-to-speech app.

This program is open-source software released under the MIT License.
firstRun.intro: Let’s set up the app for first use.
firstRun.nativeHint: System/native voice is the safest first choice. Piper can be installed now if you select a Piper voice.
firstRun.piperInstallAsk: You selected a Piper voice. Dosty Speak can install/repair Piper runtime now and then download the selected voice. This can take a while. Continue?
menu.resetSetup: Reset settings and open setup wizard…
dialog.resetSetupQuestion: This will delete Dosty Speak settings, phrases, downloaded voices, Piper runtime and bundled Python runtime, then open the first-run setup wizard again. Continue?
status.piperAlreadyInstalled: Piper runtime already exists, reusing it.
status.voiceAlreadyDownloaded: Voice model already exists, selecting it.
status.voiceDownloadFailed: Voice download failed. Check internet connection and try again.
status.voiceNotFound: Selected voice was not found in the voice catalog.
status.installingEmbeddedPython: Installing bundled official Python for Dosty Speak…
status.piperExeMissing: Piper installation finished, but piper.exe was not found.
status.vcRuntimeRequired:
Piper could not start because Microsoft Visual C++ Runtime is missing. Install Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable x64 and try Piper again.

Download: https://aka.ms/vs/17/release/vc_redist.x64.exe
status.vcRuntimeAlreadyInstalled: Microsoft Visual C++ Runtime is already installed.
status.installVcRuntimeQuestion: Piper needs Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable x64. Download and install it now? Windows may ask for administrator permission.
status.vcRuntimeInstallFailed: Microsoft Visual C++ Runtime installation failed.
status.vcRuntimeInstalled: Microsoft Visual C++ Runtime was installed. Try Piper again.
status.vcRuntimeMissing: Microsoft Visual C++ Runtime for Piper is missing. In the Voice menu, choose “Install Microsoft VC++ Runtime”.
status.onlineTtsError: Online voice could not be downloaded. Check internet connection or use Piper/native voice.
status.mp3PlayerMissing: MP3 player is missing. On Linux install ffmpeg or mpg123.
status.espeakMissing: eSpeak NG is not installed or not in PATH. On Linux run install-linux-build-deps.sh; on Windows install it separately.
status.edgeTtsMissing: edge-tts is missing. Install it with: python -m pip install edge-tts
status.edgeTtsTimeout: Microsoft Edge online voice timed out.
status.edgeTtsError: Microsoft Edge online voice failed. Details are in edge-tts-last-error.txt.
status.installEdgeTtsQuestion: Microsoft Edge online voice needs edge-tts. Install it into Dosty Speak's private environment now?
status.edgeTtsInstalled: Edge TTS was installed and configured.
status.pythonVenvMissing: Python venv is not available. On Linux install python3-venv.
status.pythonVenvInstallFailed: Automatic installation of Python venv support failed. Install python3-venv or the matching pythonX.Y-venv package and try again.
status.installEspeakQuestion: Try to install eSpeak NG? Linux/macOS may need sudo or Homebrew. Windows uses winget if available.
status.espeakManualWindows: Automatic eSpeak NG installation on Windows failed. If winget is missing, install eSpeak NG manually from GitHub releases.
status.espeakManualMac: Automatic eSpeak NG installation on macOS failed. Try manually: brew install espeak-ng
status.espeakManualLinux: Automatic eSpeak NG installation on Linux failed. Try manually installing the espeak-ng package.
firstRun.defaultVoiceIntro: Now choose the default speech engine and voice used for speaking.
firstRun.morePiperVoices: Optional: check more Piper voices to download now.
engineInfo.native:
Description: Uses the operating system voice directly. This is the simplest and most stable option.

Pros:
✓ no large model downloads
✓ fast startup
✓ good compatibility

Cons:
− quality depends on the system
− available voices differ by platform

Compatibility:
Windows: supported (SAPI / System.Speech)
macOS: supported (native say)
Linux: supported when eSpeak NG is available
engineInfo.piper:
Description: Offline neural voice with good quality without internet.

Pros:
✓ works offline
✓ better sound than classic robotic voices
✓ multiple downloadable voices

Cons:
− larger voice files
− can be slow on weak CPUs
− Windows 32-bit legacy build does not support Piper

Compatibility:
Windows 64-bit: supported (standalone Piper runtime + VC++ Runtime)
Windows 32-bit: not supported
macOS: supported (Python venv + piper-tts)
Linux: supported (Python venv + piper-tts)
engineInfo.google:
Description: Online Google voice without installing a local model.

Pros:
✓ quick setup
✓ no large models
✓ good option for quickly trying Czech

Cons:
− requires internet
− not ideal for long texts
− depends on an external online service

Compatibility:
Windows: supported (online TTS + MP3 playback)
macOS: supported (online TTS + afplay)
Linux: supported when ffplay or mpg123 is available
engineInfo.edge:
Description: Online Microsoft Edge voices through edge-tts.

Pros:
✓ more natural online voices
✓ good quality across languages
✓ can be installed into the app-managed environment

Cons:
− requires internet
− requires edge-tts and Python environment
− installation may take longer on Windows LTSC

Compatibility:
Windows: supported (app-managed Python + edge-tts)
macOS: supported (Python venv + edge-tts)
Linux: supported (Python venv + edge-tts)
engineInfo.espeak:
Description: Fast offline synthesizer for older and weaker devices.

Pros:
✓ very fast
✓ lightweight
✓ works offline

Cons:
− robotic voice
− less natural than Piper or Edge

Compatibility:
Windows: supported when eSpeak NG is installed (winget or manual install)
macOS: supported (Homebrew eSpeak NG)
Linux: supported (system espeak-ng package)
status.homebrewInstallStarted: Homebrew installation was opened in Terminal. After it finishes, run eSpeak NG installation in Dosty Speak again.
firstRun.installIntro: Choose speech engines and voices to prepare now. You can change everything later from the Voice menu.
firstRun.defaultVoiceInstalledOnly: Choose the default voice. Only available or installed voices are shown. More voices and speech engines can be installed later from the Voice menu.
status.typingLockedMode: Typing mode: Tab completes a word, arrows browse saved phrases, Esc unlocks phrase selection.
status.keyboardUnlocked: Phrase selection unlocked. Esc or Tab returns to typing.
autocomplete.hint: Keep typing, Tab completes the selected item. Press Tab again to cycle suggestions.
firstRun.piperVoiceRequired: Piper is selected, but no voice is checked for download. Please select at least one Piper voice or uncheck Piper.
voicePreset.label: Voice preset
voiceDialog.hint: Choose a synthesizer, a concrete voice and the settings that make sense for it. You can save the setup as a preset and switch it quickly in the main window.
installDialog.intro: Install speech engines and download voices here. If Piper is checked, select at least one Piper voice to download.
